ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regulatory_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory approval */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the regulatory resource */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the approval (e.g., Market Authorization) */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum required value for the approval */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed value for the approval */,
  "must_support" INTEGER /* Indicates if the approval must be supported */,
  "is_modifier" INTEGER /* Indicates if this approval is a modifier */,
  "is_summary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this approval is a summary */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the approval (e.g., clinical trial, marketing) */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the regulatory approval */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the approval becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the approval expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metadata entry */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulatory approval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the approval metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the metadata entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_metadata_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_metadata_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES regulatory_approvals ("approval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (foreign key to roles table) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role (e.g., view, upload, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated regulatory approval */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., application, report) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES regulatory_approvals ("approval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulatory approval being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks about the compliance check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* User who performed the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES regulatory_approvals ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated regulatory approval */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., renewal, compliance) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "dismissed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been dismissed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES regulatory_approvals ("approval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action took place */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected regulatory approval (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES regulatory_approvals ("approval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislation" (
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislation or guideline */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the legislation or guideline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legislation or guideline */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the legislation or guideline becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the legislation or guideline expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_legislation" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulatory approval */,
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislation or guideline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_legislation_legislation_id FOREIGN KEY ("legislation_id") REFERENCES legislation ("legislation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_legislation_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES regulatory_approvals ("approval_id")
)
